sourcesContent:
# composition matrix rows for destructuring + splats: array and
# object targets (nested, defaults, renames, rests), the swap idiom,
# rest params, param patterns and defaults, spread in array literals
# and call arguments (explicit and implicit), array catch patterns, and
# pattern loop variables — instantiated so every row evals. (The
# catch-OBJECT form is pinned outside the byte corpus: its
# hoist.)
pair = [1, 2]
obj = a: 10, b: 20

[a1, b1] = pair
{a, b} = obj
{a: ren, b: keep} = obj
[x1, [y1, z1]] = [7, [8, 9]]
{m1 = 5} = a: 3
[x1, y1] = [y1, x1]
[head, ...tail] = [1, 2, 3, 4]
{a: aOut, ...others} = a: 1, b: 2, c: 3

sum = (...nums) ->
  t = 0
  for n in nums
    t += n
  t
s1 = sum 1, 2, 3
s2 = sum ...[4, 5]
s3 = sum 1, ...[2, 3], 4

joined = [0, ...pair, 9]

dflt = (v = 42) -> v
d1 = dflt()
d2 = dflt 7

pick = ({a, b}) -> a + b
p1 = pick a: 1, b: 2
second = ([f2, s2x]) -> s2x
p2 = second [3, 4]

caught2 = 0
try
  throw [1, 2]
catch [c1, c2]
  caught2 = c2

total = 0
for [k, v] in [[1, 2], [3, 4]]
  total += k * v
names = ""
for {a: nm} in [{a: "x"}, {a: "y"}]
  names += nm

# pattern defaults in the straightforward positions: params
# (array-element and shorthand-object defaults), loop variables, and
# nested shorthand defaults in assignment position. Rename defaults
# and array-element defaults in ASSIGNMENT position are pinned
# outside the byte corpus.
pd1 = ([a3 = 1]) -> a3
pd2 = (x3 = 1, [y3 = 2]) -> x3 + y3
pd3 = ({w = 9}) -> w
dv1 = pd1 []
dv2 = pd2 5, [6]
dv3 = pd3 {}
dfor = 0
for [q = 7] in [[], [2]]
  dfor += q
[{sd = 8}] = [{}]
comp = (x2 for [a2, x2] in [[1, 2], [3, 4]])
